component.name: Bento
component.summary: Popup control centre for KDE Plasma

description.p: Bento is a customisable popup control centre for KDE Plasma. It lives in your system tray and provides quick access to configurable "blocks" — compact widgets that slide down from the top of the screen.

Bento ships a modular block system and a demo block to get you started. Additional blocks (e.g. system monitors, quick-settings panels) can be installed from the bento-blocks community collection or created with the built-in scaffold command.
Designed for Wayland-first workflows, Bento integrates with KDE's D-Bus services to give you fast, keyboard-friendly control without opening full System Settings.

ul.li: Modular block system with demo block and community block collection
